_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis-1 heterozygosity increases microglia in a spatially and temporally restricted pattern relevant to mouse optic glioma formation and growth.

_contextSnippet: Nf1+/- GFAP CKO mice at 3 months of age with radiographically and histologically obvious tumors
details: Develop radiographically and histologically obvious optic gliomas by 3 months of age
